creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I think this is a little misunderstandig. Sometimes the X system needs 
drivers from the system, drivers which you didn't load. I can imagine 
that you are not doing that on purpose, so I would like to point you to 
the x11@ mailinglist, and/or the questions@ mailinglist to help and 
determine how and which driver you can and should load to get this properly 
going. 

If we can find out that for example the driver is not yet suppoted, please 
report back to me so that I can open the PR  again, and if I have enough 
information perhaps add a quirck to one of the drivers to make it work 
or communicate with developers to get support in (or at least know the 
position and possibilities of a driver). 

Thanks for understanding and trying to get FreeBSD even better, it's 
appreciated!
